project_area: Arts (General Operating Support and Special Arts Projects)
demographic_requirements: None specified beyond eligibility as a nonprofit arts organization
eligibility_summary: Funding is available to local nonprofit organizations (501(c)(3), 501(c)(4), or 501(c)(6)) in Burlington County, New Jersey, for General Operating Support (long-standing, larger organizations) or Special Arts Projects. General Operating Support is for established organizations; Special Project grants are for other qualified organizations.
